narrative:
Perry 13 (precinct in Stark County) has 1,177 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a modest Republican lean of 5.9 percentage points.
